segments.text: Dancing in the masquerade, idle truth and plain sight jaded.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Who will I be today or not?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: But such a tide as moving seems asleep, too full for sound and foam.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: When that witch drew from out the boundless deep turns again home, twilight and evening bell, and after that,
segments.speaker: Unknown
